name: Le Poulet Rouge Apple Bread Pudding
recipeInstructions:
-----------------------WHISKEY SAUCE-----------------------
6 tablespoons Unsalted butter, melted
1 cup Powdered sugar
1 Egg
2 tablespoons Sour mash whiskey; to taste
Whipped cream; sweetened
The night before, peel apple and cut into large pieces. Toss with 2 tablespoons of sugar. Tear croissants into bite-size pieces. Combine the croissant and apple pieces with milk and raisins. Mix well. Cover and refrigerate overnight or for at least 12 hours.
Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 C). In a small bowl, whisk together eggs, vanilla, sugar, and nutmeg until combined. Pour this mixture over the custard ingredients and mix well. Pour into a buttered 8-by-11-inch glass baking dish. Bake for 1 hour or until puffy and browned. As soon as removed from oven, pour whiskey sauce over top. Let cool about 5 minutes before serving with mounds of whipped cream. Serves 8
Whiskey sauce: Whisk egg into melted butter. Stir in powdered sugar and whiskey until well combined. The sauce may be made up to 2 days ahead. It keeps for 2 to 3 days refrigerated.
